note: Cloudflare R2 object storage economics (egress-free). Storage billed per GB-month; operations billed per million in two classes (A = write/list, B = read). Free tier: 10 GB storage, 1M Class A ops, 10M Class B ops. Cross-check the source before any billing decision.

sources.what: R2 storage $0.015/GB-month; Class A 1M free / Class B 10M free per month
R2 pricing: Class A $4.50/million, Class B $0.36/million requests
